text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On my day off, I head to the shopping district for some shopping.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Why, if it isn't my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Might you be here to carry my bags? Heh-heh, I'm touched! Now work
to your heart's content.
choice_data_list: I came here to do some personal shopping...
I came here to do some personal shopping...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No worries, I don't mind. You can get that over with along the way. As
you know, I am nothing if not magnanimous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, I get roped into Agnes Tachyon's shopping trip.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A single tomato provides a non-insignificant amount of nutrition, and
yet this cumbersome body of mine still demands more.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So I'll get a tomato... and three steamed chicken breasts to make a
salad. I can't neglect my protein intake if I want to see muscle growth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Agh, what a hassle. If only I could sustain myself solely on
supplements.
choice_data_list: Supplements don't taste good, you know?
Supplements don't taste good, you know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey now, isn't eating just an act to replenish our nutrients?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Most sources of nutrients can be absorbed even if they're ingested in
their base state. In some cases such as lycopene, ingesting processed
foods is more efficient.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However, I have no time to waste on cooking. Usually, I just throw
everything I buy into a food processor and call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If possible, I don't want to waste even a second on oral
replenishment. Time is finite, my dear Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The more I hear about Agnes Tachyon's diet, the more worried I get.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If the cafeteria was always open, I wouldn't have to waste my time shopping.
choice_data_list: Want me to cook for you?
Want me to cook for you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You, cook?! Haha! Should I call you devoted or just subservient?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I can't rule out the possibility that you may have developed an
addiction to serving me after all of our experiments.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, fine by me. It'll free up my day. Not a bad idea at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's decided—I'll leave dinner to you. Attend to me with all your
being!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, and don't make anything too high in calories. Make sure to
prepare something nutritionally balanced.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now I'm in charge of Agnes Tachyon's meal prep.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What's the matter, calling me out at this time?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that's right! I was so absorbed in my research that I forgot to
eat.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You see, I decided to go back to basics. Like the pursuit of
faster-than-light speed, unlocking the potential of Umamusume
requires the use of four-momentum—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What are you so riled up about? In any case, my research is in a good
place. I won't need you for some time, but you can look forward to it
all the same.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll take that food off your hands, but I must return to my lab
posthaste—my research begs for a resolution.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next morning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Good morning, Trainer. Here, my lunchbox.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon thrusts an empty lunchbox into my hands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Vitamins, minerals, proteins... Lipids and carbohydrates, too. All present. I give it an A for balance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't unpalatable. But there are two things you can improve for
next time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
First—I consumed the food during the downtime between
experiments, but having to use chopsticks proved to be a hassle. Fix
that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Second—there was far too little rice to accompany the main dish. Add
some more to balance things out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I assume today's portion is a lost cause, but I expect these flaws to be
ironed out moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: My breakfast, of course. You do have it, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's time for me to return to the lab. Come on, hand it over.
choice_data_list: I don't have anything for you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You didn't make me breakfast?! You're kidding me! You're telling me
I left my research for this?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Didn't you promise to prepare my meals?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Do I have to ask you for every meal?! That would be way too
inefficient!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's your job to look after me! So give me something to eat, pronto!
choice_data_list: I'll try to make something by lunchtime...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I said now! I want to eat now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I can only suppress this craving with nourishment—or experimentation
at your expense.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, pick your poison. Either make me food or fulfill your role as my
guinea pig.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fine by me. I'll move our experiment to the afternoon, so hurry up
with that breakfast, will you?
choice_data_list: You're still going to experiment on me?!
You're still going to experiment on me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Naturally—it's your duty as my guinea pig. Making me food is your
duty as my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Going all the way to the cafeteria is too much of a pain. I think I'll go
take a nap, so wake me up when the food is ready.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'm not asking for much. Feel free to use the leftover ingredients
from yesterday's meal. You still have them, I assume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: All right, hop to it! Hurry up and make me food!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad Tachyon has an interest in food again, but does she really
expect me to make her food every day?
